summary: This document outlines the long-term strategic vision for KeepMeCompany, focusing on solving inefficiencies in UK GP practices through AI-powered phone agents and practice management orchestration. It details a phased rollout starting with high-ROI tasks like intake and QOF calls before expanding into a broader platform that acts as an advisor to practice managers. The strategy emphasizes human-in-the-loop AI training initially, aiming to eventually achieve full automation while addressing distribution and market lock-in risks.
